description: next/ pilot — copy of profiles/machines/cnc-machine.json + constraints facet. Inherits power_positive_when_running from SMProfile-Machine. CNC machining center — OPC 40077 process data (spindle, feed, axes, tool, coolant, vibration).

attributes.name: Act_Status_Machine
attributes.description: Actual machine status. VOCABULARY MEASURED 2026-07-12 over the FULL population (factory.machine_state_history, 22.1 Mio rows, GROUP BY status): IDLE (13.518.442), RUNNING (8.099.280), STOPPED (470.620), MAINTENANCE (17.994); cross-checked at the wire by reading opc.tcp://192.168.178.154:36000 ns=1;s=Machine/status (returned "IDLE", same uppercase dialect) and against :38260/api/machines (status_raw RUNNING). The old prose additionally claimed FAULT and OFFLINE — neither has ever occurred; they are NOT declared, because an undeclared-but-real value is caught by the drift check while a declared-but-fictional value silently licenses a dead guard. MTConnect bridge derives the value via valueMap (ACTIVE -> RUNNING, * -> IDLE) — its image {RUNNING, IDLE} is a subset of this enum (checked by ci/lint-vocabulary.mjs).

attributes.name: Act_Text_MachineMode
attributes.description: Machine operating mode. VOCABULARY MEASURED 2026-07-12 over the FULL population (factory.machine_state_history, GROUP BY mode): AUTO (20.195.187), MANUAL (1.166.249), SETUP (744.900); wire-checked via ns=1;s=Machine/mode (returned "AUTO"). Declared so that the FIRST guard written against this attribute is verified against reality instead of against a comment.

attributes.name: Act_State_InCycle
attributes.description: Machine is in the machining cycle (TRUE/FALSE). Trigger for the cycle-detect FSM on the edge.

constraints.name: spindle_load_control_limits
constraints.description: Control limits (Warngrenze + Eingriffsgrenze) for spindle load %. Two-tier band: inside warn [0,55] = ok; outside warn -> 'warning'-tier alarm (watch); outside the action band [0,70] -> 'error'-tier alarm (intervene). Raise/clear lifecycle, auto-clears once the value returns inside the warn band. LITERAL bands = static SSOT for the pilot. --- 2026-07-12 CAPT-STURM: declares a `persistence` policy (anti-chatter). A single sample outside a band is not a deviation — an EPISODE is. `raise` is a Western-Electric run rule (2 of the last 3 evaluations must breach); `clear` is an ISA-18.2 dead-band (the value must return inside the limit by 15 % of the band width, for 3 evaluations). The LIMITS ARE UNCHANGED — this removes chatter, not signal. Declaring it is now MANDATORY for every live `between`/`within_limits` rule (ci/lint-constraints.mjs, fail-closed): a rule the detector cannot police is a rule that reports its own arithmetic instead of the machine. MEASURED 2026-07-12: 4.235 episodes across cnc-001/002/mtc-02 — the same chatter as the hot-runner storm on sgm-006, one order of magnitude smaller.

constraints.name: spindle_temp_control_limits
constraints.description: Control limits (Warngrenze + Eingriffsgrenze) for spindle temperature degC. Inside warn [15,45] = ok; outside warn -> 'warning'-tier; outside action [10,55] -> 'error'-tier. Raise/clear, auto-clears inside the warn band. --- 2026-07-12 CAPT-STURM: declares a `persistence` policy (anti-chatter). A single sample outside a band is not a deviation — an EPISODE is. `raise` is a Western-Electric run rule (2 of the last 3 evaluations must breach); `clear` is an ISA-18.2 dead-band (the value must return inside the limit by 15 % of the band width, for 3 evaluations). The LIMITS ARE UNCHANGED — this removes chatter, not signal. Declaring it is now MANDATORY for every live `between`/`within_limits` rule (ci/lint-constraints.mjs, fail-closed): a rule the detector cannot police is a rule that reports its own arithmetic instead of the machine.

constraints.name: spindle_power_control_limits
constraints.description: Control limits (Warngrenze + Eingriffsgrenze) for active power kW. Inside warn [0,45] = ok; outside warn -> 'warning'-tier; outside action [0,55] -> 'error'-tier. Raise/clear, auto-clears inside the warn band. --- 2026-07-12 CAPT-STURM: declares a `persistence` policy (anti-chatter). A single sample outside a band is not a deviation — an EPISODE is. `raise` is a Western-Electric run rule (2 of the last 3 evaluations must breach); `clear` is an ISA-18.2 dead-band (the value must return inside the limit by 15 % of the band width, for 3 evaluations). The LIMITS ARE UNCHANGED — this removes chatter, not signal. Declaring it is now MANDATORY for every live `between`/`within_limits` rule (ci/lint-constraints.mjs, fail-closed): a rule the detector cannot police is a rule that reports its own arithmetic instead of the machine. MEASURED 2026-07-12: 236 episodes across the cnc fleet.

constraints.name: spindle_when_in_cycle
constraints.description: Machining cycle is running but the spindle is not turning — tool break / spindle-motor fault / controller bug.

constraints.name: coolant_pressure_when_in_cycle
constraints.description: Machining cycle is running without coolant pressure — risk of workpiece / tool damage.

constraints.name: tool_wear_in_range
constraints.description: Tool wear must lie between 0 and 100 percent — values outside indicate a sensor / scaling fault. --- 2026-07-12 CAPT-STURM: declares a `persistence` policy (anti-chatter). A single sample outside a band is not a deviation — an EPISODE is. `raise` is a Western-Electric run rule (2 of the last 3 evaluations must breach); `clear` is an ISA-18.2 dead-band (the value must return inside the limit by 15 % of the band width, for 3 evaluations). The LIMITS ARE UNCHANGED — this removes chatter, not signal. Declaring it is now MANDATORY for every live `between`/`within_limits` rule (ci/lint-constraints.mjs, fail-closed): a rule the detector cannot police is a rule that reports its own arithmetic instead of the machine.

constraints.name: power_positive_when_running
constraints.description: Machine reports status=RUNNING but draws 0 kW — sensor / edge-communication fault (equipment).
